entries.summary: WatchTower core helper and harness workspace.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core [-h] <command> ...

entries.summary: Apply initiative-level closeout state to the governed traceability index and refresh the derived initiative, coordination, and human-readable planning trackers that mirror that state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core closeout [-h] <closeout_command> ...

entries.summary: Set terminal closeout state for one traced initiative and, in write mode, persist it to the traceability index plus the derived initiative, coordination, PRD, decision, and design trackers.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core closeout initiative [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID --initiative-status {completed,superseded,cancelled,abandoned} --closure-reason CLOSURE_REASON [--superseded-by-trace-id SUPERSEDED_BY_TRACE_ID] [--closed-at CLOSED_AT] [--allow-open-tasks] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run a small, low-risk workspace health snapshot that confirms the core Python CLI is installed and that the main governed lookup surfaces load successfully.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core doctor [-h] [--format {human,json}]
entries.notes: Current behavior is a minimal scaffold-level smoke check with no mutation.

entries.summary: Search the governed lookup surfaces without opening the raw JSON artifacts directly.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query [-h] <query_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints query-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Search governed acceptance contracts by trace, source PRD, or acceptance ID.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query acceptance [-h] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--source-prd-id SOURCE_PRD_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the command index for documented repository commands and subcommands.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query commands [-h] [--query QUERY] [--kind KIND] [--tag TAG] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the coordination index through the machine start-here path for current planning state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query coordination [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--initiative-status INITIATIVE_STATUS] [--current-phase CURRENT_PHASE] [--owner OWNER] [--blocked-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the decision index for governed durable decision records.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query decisions [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--decision-status DECISION_STATUS] [--tag TAG] [--linked-prd-id LINKED_PRD_ID] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the design-document index for governed feature designs and implementation plans.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query designs [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--family FAMILY] [--tag TAG] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search governed validation-evidence artifacts by trace, overall result, acceptance ID, or validator ID.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query evidence [-h] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--result RESULT] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed foundation index for repository intent-layer documents such as design philosophy, product shape, and technology direction.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query foundations [-h] [--query QUERY] [--foundation-id FOUNDATION_ID] [--audience AUDIENCE] [--authority AUTHORITY] [--tag TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--cited-by-path CITED_BY_PATH] [--applied-by-path APPLIED_BY_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the cross-family initiative index for the current phase, active ownership, blockers, and next step of a traced initiative.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query initiatives [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--initiative-status INITIATIVE_STATUS] [--current-phase CURRENT_PHASE] [--owner OWNER] [--blocked-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the repository path index by free text or exact filters.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query paths [-h] [--query QUERY] [--surface-kind SURFACE_KIND] [--maturity MATURITY] [--priority PRIORITY] [--audience-hint AUDIENCE_HINT] [--tag TAG] [--parent-path PARENT_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the PRD index for governed product requirements documents.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query prds [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--tag TAG] [--requirement-id REQUIREMENT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed reference index for curated internal reference documents and their upstream authority links.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query references [-h] [--query QUERY] [--reference-id REFERENCE_ID] [--tag TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--upstream-url UPSTREAM_URL] [--cited-by-path CITED_BY_PATH] [--applied-by-path APPLIED_BY_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed standard index for repository standards and best-practice docs.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query standards [-h] [--query QUERY] [--standard-id STANDARD_ID] [--category CATEGORY] [--tag TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the task index for local-first task records.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query tasks [-h] [--query QUERY] [--task-id TASK_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--task-status TASK_STATUS] [--priority PRIORITY] [--owner OWNER] [--task-kind TASK_KIND] [--blocked-only] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--include-dependency-details] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Resolve one traceability record by its stable trace identifier.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query trace [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed workflow index for workflow modules and the standards, references, or canonical files that govern them.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query workflows [-h] [--query QUERY] [--workflow-id WORKFLOW_ID] [--phase-type PHASE_TYPE] [--task-family TASK_FAMILY] [--trigger-tag TRIGGER_TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild derived governed artifacts from authored repository sources.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync [-h] <sync_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints sync-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Rebuild all local deterministic sync surfaces in one run.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync all [-h] [--write] [--output-dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the command index from the registry-backed CLI parser metadata while keeping the command pages under `docs/commands/` as the human-readable companion surface.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync command-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the deterministic coordination slice for task, traceability, initiative, coordination-index, and compact coordination-tracking surfaces in dependency order.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync coordination [-h] [--write] [--output-dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the decision index from the governed decision records under `docs/planning/decisions/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync decision-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable decision tracker from the governed decision index and the initiative-closeout state stored in traceability.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync decision-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the design-document index from the governed design documents under `docs/planning/design/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync design-document-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable design tracker from the governed design index and the initiative-closeout state stored in traceability.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync design-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the foundation index from the governed foundation documents under `docs/foundations/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync foundation-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Push local-first task records to GitHub in a push-only, local-source model.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync github-tasks [-h] [--write] [--repo REPO] [--task-id TASK_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--task-status TASK_STATUS] [--priority PRIORITY] [--owner OWNER] [--task-kind TASK_KIND] [--blocked-only] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--project-owner PROJECT_OWNER] [--project-owner-type {user,organization}] [--project-number PROJECT_NUMBER] [--project-status-field PROJECT_STATUS_FIELD] [--no-label-sync] [--token-env TOKEN_ENV] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the cross-family initiative index from traceability plus the current planning and task indexes.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync initiative-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable initiative tracker from the governed initiative index.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync initiative-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the PRD index from the governed PRD documents under `docs/planning/prds/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync prd-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable PRD tracker from the governed PRD index and the initiative-closeout state stored in traceability.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync prd-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the reference index from the governed reference documents under `docs/references/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync reference-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the repository path index from README inventory tables.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync repository-paths [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]
entries.notes: Runs in dry-run mode by default and only writes when --write or --output is provided.

entries.summary: Rebuild the standard index from the governed standards under `docs/standards/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync standard-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the task index from the governed task documents under `docs/planning/tasks/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync task-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable task tracker from the governed task documents under `docs/planning/tasks/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync task-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the traceability index from the governed planning indexes, acceptance contracts, and validation evidence artifacts.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync traceability-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the workflow index from the workflow modules under `workflows/modules/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync workflow-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run validation commands against governed repository artifacts and document surfaces.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate [-h] <validate_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints validate-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Validate one traced initiative across PRD acceptance IDs, acceptance contracts, validation evidence, validator references, and the traceability index.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate acceptance [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run the current explicit validation families across the governed repository surfaces in deterministic order.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate all [-h] [--skip-front-matter] [--skip-document-semantics] [--skip-artifacts] [--skip-acceptance] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Validate one governed JSON artifact against the active schema-backed validators published in the control plane.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate artifact [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID | --schema-id SCHEMA_ID] [--supplemental-schema-path SUPPLEMENTAL_SCHEMA_PATH] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]
entries.notes: Can optionally write durable validation evidence and a synchronized traceability update when --record-evidence is used.

entries.summary: Validate one governed Markdown document against the repository's semantic document rules, such as required sections, section order, applied-reference explanation rules, and family-specific guardrails.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate document-semantics [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]

entries.summary: Validate one Markdown document front-matter block against the governed front-matter profiles published in the control plane.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate front-matter [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]
entries.notes: Can optionally write durable validation evidence and a synchronized traceability update when --record-evidence is used.
